title: Set Item description via API
excerpt: Hi, is it possible to set Item description when create an item via API?

posts.author: Dzmitryi (Dzmitryi)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, is it possible to set Item description when create an item via API?

posts.author: rachelatmonday (Rachel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Dzmitryi,

Welcome to the community!

To clarify - do you mean the name of the item (TEST 1 in the screenshot)? Some features, like boards, have descriptions, but items don’t!

Screenshot 2024-09-24 at 1.04.48 PM1270×74 3.23 KB

If so, you can set the item name using the create item mutation (read about it here).

Best,
Rachel

posts.author: Dzmitryi (Dzmitryi)
posts.cookedHtml:
No, I mean description of the item, that is displayed when you open item.

Screenshot 2024-09-25 at 10.49.503062×1466 185 KB

posts.author: rachelatmonday (Rachel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Oh, I see!

This looks like it might be a new release that’s part of monday Dev. This feature isn’t yet supported by the API, so I’ve changed your post into a feature request so it may be considered in the roadmap.

Let us know if you have any other questions!

Best,
Rachel
